headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex, large cap context, no immediate P&L transmission) — Adani Power launches nuclear unit as sector liberalizes, signaling long-term energy transition play.
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks; no new deadlines or penalties from this event.
No P/E compression or margin erosion at this stage; future upside possible if nuclear unit scales.
No current cost of capital impact; green financing potential if nuclear investments align with taxonomy.
